highlights.description: Domain-specific ontology packages as opt-in imports while keeping core slogo generic
Alert condition builders for OpenSLO alert policies with burn rate configuration

added.description: Alert condition builders and helpers for OpenSLO alert policies
AlertSeverity type with critical, high, medium, low, info levels
Requirement types with Target containing RateGoal and DurationGoal
Requirements slice type with Table() method for rendering summaries
CLI tool `gen-examples-json-yaml` for generating JSON/YAML from example SLOs
CLI tool `gen-metrics-doc` for generating METRICS.md documentation
CLI tool `label-stats` for analyzing label usage across examples
Datadog HCL converter stub for Terraform integration
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/iam` for IAM/IGA labels
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/product` for AARRR journey stages
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/business` for business verticals
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/saas` for multi-tenancy labels
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/security` for security labels
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/compliance` for regulatory frameworks
Domain ontology package `ontologies/domains/operations` for operational processes

changed.description: Core ontology reduced to 12 generic SLO labels (framework, layer, scope, audience, category, severity, tier, metric-type, resource-type, service, team, environment)
Domain-specific labels moved to opt-in `ontologies/domains/` packages

upgradeGuide.description: Import domain packages for domain-specific labels: `ontologies/domains/business`, `ontologies/domains/product`, etc.

build.description: Add .gitignore for development tools and build artifacts

documentation.description: Add UTF-8 icons to README bullet lists for improved readability
Add CHANGELOG.json and CHANGELOG.md covering v0.1.0-v0.3.0

highlights.description: Comprehensive SLO ontology with 22 dimensions for categorizing and filtering SLOs
Multiple example sets: AI agents, RED metrics, USE metrics, SaaS CRM, budgeting methods

added.description: Ontology package with 22 labeling dimensions for SLO categorization

Label dimensions: framework, layer, scope, audience, category, severity, tier, metric-type, resource-type, service, team, environment, domain, process, access-model, risk-level, risk-type, capability, workflow, impact, journey-stage
MetricReport type for analyzing label usage across SLO sets
Example set: AI agents with availability, cost efficiency, response quality, response time, task completion, user engagement SLOs
Example set: RED metrics (Rate, Errors, Duration) with availability SLO
Example set: USE metrics (Utilization, Saturation, Errors)
Example set: SaaS CRM with business outcomes, feature adoption, user activation, user engagement, user retention SLOs
JSON and YAML renderings of all example SLOs
SLOsByDirAndFileSlug() and WriteExampleJSONAndYAMLFiles() helpers
Labels() function for retrieving SLO labels
ExampleSLOsByDirectory() for loading examples by directory
WriteSLOSetsReport() for generating metrics documentation

changed.description: All ontology labels now use kebab-case consistently

documentation.description: METRICS.md generated documentation for example SLO sets
Updated README.md with ontology and examples documentation

highlights.description: Initial release with OpenSLO SDK wrapper and basic example SLOs

added.description: Objects type for managing collections of OpenSLO objects
Initial Go code examples demonstrating OpenSLO SLO definitions
MIT License
GitHub Actions CI workflow
Initial README.md documentation
